about.title: About the Association
about.label: About
about.hero_subtitle: Since 1994, we unite Georgian cartographers, geographers and GIS specialists — for the development and international recognition of Georgian cartography.
about.mission_text: Development, promotion and integration of Georgian cartography with international standards.
about.vision_text: Cartography — an accessible science for all. Open data, modern technologies.
about.values_text: Accuracy, innovation, transparency and international cooperation.
about.history_1998: Full member of ICA (International Cartographic Association)
about.history_2005: Publication of the first national atlas
about.history_2012: Creation of the Digital Cartography Division
about.history_2024: Launch of the Open Data Platform

membership.title: Become a member of the Association
membership.hero_subtitle: Join the community of Georgian cartographers.
membership.cta_text: Contact us by email or phone — we will answer all your questions and help you through the membership process.
membership.benefit_ica: Participation in ICA (International Cartographic Association) events
membership.benefit_bulletin: Free subscription to the Association's scientific bulletin
membership.benefit_library: Access to the Association's library and resources
